description: English labels and messages for Column Type Model Training.

labels.pageDescription: Train, compare, activate, and roll back reusable column type models using confirmed gold labels collected across projects.
labels.activeModelDescription: The champion model currently used by INIT$_SP_PREDICTED_TYPE in this Target DB.
labels.finalGroupDistributionDescription: Final analytical groups are CATEGORICAL, CONTINUOUS, and OTHER.
labels.labelQualityDescription: Only explicitly confirmed labels are eligible. Automatic and legacy labels remain excluded.
labels.detailedTypeDistributionDescription: Detailed type codes are kept separately from the three final type groups.
labels.validationMetricsDescription: Macro F1, balanced accuracy, per-class recall, and confusion data from an independent holdout.
labels.trainingDatasetDescription: Review deduplicated, user-confirmed gold labels and inspect labels excluded from training.
labels.goldLabelNotice: Training eligibility requires an explicitly confirmed gold label. AUTO_RULE, AUTO_MODEL, AUTO_BOTH, and LEGACY_UNKNOWN are never treated as gold labels.
labels.trainCandidateDescription: Training creates an immutable candidate. The active champion is not replaced until validation and explicit activation.
labels.trainingSafetyNotice: Rows, seed, and holdout are bounded. Training runs in the Target DB and never replaces the champion automatically.
labels.candidateComparisonDescription: Compare independent holdout metrics before activation.
labels.modelVersionsDescription: Activate a validated candidate, roll back to a previous version, or archive unused candidates.
labels.runHistoryDescription: Review immutable training requests, bounded resources, validation results, and errors.

messages.summaryLoadFailed: Model summary could not be loaded.
messages.datasetStatsLoadFailed: Dataset statistics could not be loaded.
messages.datasetLoadFailed: Training data could not be loaded.
messages.modelsLoadFailed: Model versions could not be loaded.
messages.runsLoadFailed: Training runs could not be loaded.
messages.confirmStartTraining: Start {algorithm} training with at most {rows} confirmed gold labels?
messages.trainingStarted: Candidate training started. The champion remains unchanged.
messages.confirmActivateModel: Activate candidate version {version} as the new champion?
messages.confirmRollbackModel: Roll back the active model to version {version}?
messages.confirmRollbackCurrentModel: Roll back the current champion version {version} to the most recent previous model?
messages.modelActivated: The candidate is now the active champion.
messages.modelRolledBack: The model was rolled back safely.
messages.noConfusionMatrix: Confusion matrix data is not available.
messages.noTrainingData: No training data matches the current filters.
messages.noModelsToCompare: No champion or candidate is available for comparison.
